kit.name: TD613 Safe Harbor command surfaces
kit.subtitle: Canonical packet intake, compact public footer, detached signature wrappers.

public_sendables.01: Minimal verify command. Public by default and unsigned.
public_sendables.02: Verify command with receipt-completion contract. Public by default and unsigned.
public_sendables.03: Minimal render JSON. Can include packet metadata but never packet hash or sig in public mode.
public_sendables.04: Extended render JSON with receipt contract. Still no live sig generation.

live_template.payload_rule: Suggest next payload from signed bundle if available; manual override only in operator mode.

signature_distinction.cadence_signature: stylometric credential from TCP-style cadence intake
signature_distinction.rule: JWS or detached-ed25519 wraps the packet after canonicalization.

badge_generator_rule: Consumes canon and packet metadata but never generates sig.
